description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a slightly domed top. It features a prominent black hose attached near the top, which curves downward and is secured to the side of the cylinder. The top assembly includes a metallic handle and lever mechanism, as well as a nozzle for discharging the extinguishing agent. The front of the extinguisher displays a large, rectangular label with white and red instructional text and pictograms, bordered by a reflective silver band around the body. The base is flat, allowing the extinguisher to stand upright, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for emergency use in urban environments.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, metallic handle, and detailed instructional label on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the instructional label, the black hose attached to the side, and the metallic handle and lever at the top.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the back of the extinguisher with less visible labeling and a clear view of the hose running down the side.
description_view_2: This angled side view highlights the metallic handle, the nozzle, and the attachment point of the hose, with the label partially visible.
description_view_3: The direct side view shows the hose running vertically along the body and the handle assembly from behind, with minimal label visibility.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular label with red and white text and pictograms on the front; reflective silver band around the body.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black hose attached near the top, curving downward and secured to the side; metallic nozzle at the end.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Metallic safety pin visible at the top near the handle.
